reviews.author: Prem
reviews.review_body: School is good and curriculum is good

reviews.author: p.sharma
reviews.review_body: This is the worst school in the area. Untrained teacher beating of students is common and supported by principal. No CCTV and admin department is worst . They will delay everything including providing TC

reviews.author: Anonymous
reviews.review_body:
Worst transport officials 

No proper response.
Because of their lack of efficiency of planning.

reviews.author: Prem
reviews.review_body: The transportation staff is very reluctant and unable to function the Live Fleetx App until now. The bus staff also does not share the live location. Every day parents have to ask but there is no action being taken until now. They have blocked us in the group and allow only admin to send the msg. Now tell us, what we should do.

reviews.author: Prabhat Kumar
reviews.review_body: Adminstration of DPS kollur is very prompt .Accedemically anyway DPS is always at par. Special thanks to Mr Dev and team who answer any query in no time .😊

reviews.author: Lavanya Guguloth
reviews.review_body: Very good school. Happy to have taken admission here. Also school students are National Archery Champions. Proud of it.

reviews.author: Arathi Bangaru
reviews.review_body: As a parent reviewing Delhi Public School, many appreciate its strong academic curriculum, dedicated teachers, and a wide range of extracurricular activities. The school emphasizes holistic development and encourages student participation in various programs. However, some parents express concerns about the competitive environment and the pressure it may place on children. Overall, the school is well-regarded for its commitment to education and student growth

reviews.author: navel king
reviews.review_body: School is very disciplined and kids become very active in their education and Teachers are very well professionally educated

reviews.author: gali venkata krishnaareddy
reviews.review_body: I would like to inform you that my daughter's are studying at Delhi Public School Kollur. I believe this is a very good school, with an excellent approach from the principal and a supportive administration department. The quality of education is outstanding, and the extracurricular activities are also rich and diverse. Thank you, DPS Kollur, for maintaining such high standards in this locality. In comparison to other schools, we highly recommend Delhi Public School Kollur.

reviews.author: Saritha Kumari Bathula
reviews.review_body: Academics and extra  curriculum activities excellent  .. infrastructure transportation  well maintained .School administration,  Co- Ordinators  are very helpful and give quick response .
